name: acc1
drl:
rule R1 when accumulate( P($a : v); $s : sum($a) ) then end
rule R2 when accumulate( P($a : v); $c : count($a) ) then end
rule R3 when accumulate( P($a : v); $m : average($a) ) then end
rule R4 when accumulate( P($a : v); $lo : min($a) ) then end
rule R5 when accumulate( P($a : v); $hi : max($a) ) then end
rule R6 when accumulate( Q($b : n); $si : sum($b) ) then end
rule R7 when accumulate( Q($b : n); $mi : min($b) ) then end
rule R8 when accumulate( P($a : v); $c2 : count() ) then end
